src_raw: 2018年是全球金融危機發生十周年，十年間國際政經形勢經歷巨大轉變，當中不乏一幕幕超乎最佳編劇所能想像的場景。我在去年的年報指出，2017年金融市場表現是「喜出望外」，同時提到前景「潛藏隱憂」。回顧2018年，或許可形容為「先喜後悲」。環球多個股票指數在1月創出歷史新高後不久，熾熱的投資情緒旋即遇上中美貿易摩擦的冷鋒，加上英國脫歐談判一直拉鋸、地緣政治惡化、美聯儲四次加息等因素，市場樂觀氣氛急劇逆轉，資產價格在年內大幅下跌。MSCI全球指數從高點至低點曾下跌20.3%，全年累跌約一成，是2008年環球金融危機以來表現最差的一年。恒生指數從高點最多曾下跌26.7%，全年下挫13.6%，錄得七年來最大年度跌幅。
mt_raw: 2018 marked the tenth anniversary of the global financial crisis. Over the past decade, the international political and economic landscape has undergone profound transformations, with events unfolding that even the most imaginative screenwriters could not have envisioned. In last year’s annual report, I noted that the 2017 financial market performance was “unexpectedly positive,” while also highlighting “underlying concerns” about the outlook. Looking back at 2018, it might be characterized as “initial optimism followed by sorrow.” Shortly after global stock indices hit record highs in January, the fervent investment sentiment was abruptly met with the cold front of U.S.-China trade tensions, compounded by prolonged Brexit negotiations, deteriorating geopolitical conditions, and four interest rate hikes by the Federal Reserve. This led to a sharp reversal of market optimism and a significant decline in asset prices throughout the year. The MSCI Global Index fell 20.3% from its peak to its trough, with a cumulative decline of about 10% for the year, marking the worst performance since the 2008 global financial crisis. The Hang Seng Index fell as much as 26.7% from its peak, declining 13.6% for the year, recording its largest annual drop in seven years.

src_raw: 儘管外圍形勢波動難測，香港金融體系仍然保持穩健，貨幣市場運作暢順無阻。實施三十五年的聯繫匯率制度成功應對了資金流出港元的考驗。自環球金融危機爆發以來，累積約10,000億港元等值的資金流入港元。去年，隨着美國息率上升，港美息差持續擴闊，「沽港元、買美元」套息活動增加，港元兌美元匯率在年初轉弱，2005年制訂的「弱方兌換保證」，自4月首度觸發後，年內再觸發26次。金管局按照既定機制，履行「買港元、沽美元」的弱方兌換保證，有序、透明地在市場承接1,035億港元的港元沽盤。隨着資金流走，一個月香港銀行同業拆息在2018年內累升了105基點，而銀行亦在去年9月美國加息後，上調了最優惠利率。金管局多次和適時通過不同渠道向公眾闡釋「弱方兌換保證」的運作機制，令公眾了解資金流出港元是香港利率正常化的必經過程，也是聯匯制度的正常運作。國際貨幣基金組織在去年年底重申支持香港聯匯制度的立場，特區政府也強調聯匯是香港貨幣穩定的基石。這都有助於穩定香港市民對聯繫匯率的信心。
mt_raw: Despite uncertainties in the external environment, Hong Kong's financial system remains robust, and the currency market operates smoothly. The linked exchange rate system, implemented for 35 years, has successfully withstood tests of capital outflows from Hong Kong dollars. Since the onset of the global financial crisis, approximately HKD 10,000 billion worth of funds have flowed into Hong Kong dollars. Last year, as US interest rates rose, the Hong Kong-US interest rate differential continued to widen, leading to increased "sell Hong Kong dollars, buy US dollars" arbitrage activities. As a result, the Hong Kong dollar exchange rate against the US dollar weakened at the beginning of the year, and the "assured convertibility arrangement" established in 2005 was triggered 26 times throughout the year, after being triggered for the first time in April. The Hong Kong Monetary Authority, in accordance with established mechanisms, fulfilled the assured convertibility arrangement by buying Hong Kong dollars and selling US dollars, absorbing HKD 103.5 billion in Hong Kong dollar sell orders in an orderly and transparent manner. As funds flowed out, the one-month Hong Kong interbank offered rate (HIBOR) rose by 105 basis points within 2018, and banks also raised their prime lending rates following the US interest rate hike in September last year. The Hong Kong Monetary Authority has repeatedly and timely clarified the operation of the "assured convertibility arrangement" through various channels, helping the public understand that capital outflows from Hong Kong dollars are an inevitable process of interest rate normalization in Hong Kong and a normal operation of the linked exchange rate system. The International Monetary Fund reaffirmed its support for Hong Kong's linked exchange rate system at the end of last year, and the Special Administrative Region government has also emphasized that the linked exchange rate is the cornerstone of Hong Kong's currency stability. This has helped to bolster public confidence in the linked exchange rate system.

src_raw: 2008年環球金融危機暴露了全球金融系統潛藏的種種弊端及隱患，促使國際間在過去十年協調推出一系列針對金融市場、金融機構的改革，包括在銀行業監管方面，提升企業管治和風險管理。金管局的銀行監管工作重點針對兩方面：一是着眼於銀行資產負債風險的審慎監管，二是銀行的行為操守，二者不可偏廢。資產負債風險監管方面，金管局作為巴塞爾銀行監管委員會(Basel Committee on Banking Supervision)及二十國集團轄下金融穩定理事會(FinancialStability Board)成員，有責任全面落實國際監管標準，確保香港銀行業穩健審慎地經營業務。去年底香港銀行資本充足率達20.3%，不但遠高於國際最低標準要求的8%，也較環球金融危機時的14.7%水平顯著提升。大型銀行去年第四季平均流動覆蓋比率達167.6%，同樣遠高於法定最低要求的90%。與此同時，為避免重蹈環球金融危機時需動用公帑拯救「大得不能倒」金融機構的覆轍，金融穩定理事會制訂了關於金融機構處置機制的國際標準。香港是亞洲區內少數已經全面落實符合機制要求的地區之一，金管局下設的處置機制辦公室正落實該機制的操作細則，要求銀行推行結構性變動令處置預案在需要時能有效實施，去年亦推出了《吸收虧損能力規則》，未來還會陸續推出更多相關規則。
mt_raw: The 2008 global financial crisis exposed numerous hidden flaws and risks within the global financial system, prompting international coordination over the past decade to implement a series of reforms targeting financial markets and financial institutions, including enhanced corporate governance and risk management in the banking sector. The Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) focuses its banking supervision on two key areas: first, prudent regulation of banks' balance sheet risks, and second, the conduct and ethics of banks. Both aspects are equally important and cannot be neglected. In terms of balance sheet risk regulation, as a member of the Basel Committee on Banking Supervision and the Financial Stability Board under the G20, the HKMA has a responsibility to fully implement international regulatory standards, ensuring that Hong Kong's banking sector operates in a stable and prudent manner. At the end of last year, Hong Kong's banking sector had a capital adequacy ratio of 20.3%, which is not only significantly higher than the international minimum requirement of 8%, but also a marked improvement from the 14.7% level during the global financial crisis. In the fourth quarter of last year, the average liquidity coverage ratio of major banks reached 167.6%, far exceeding the statutory minimum requirement of 90%. At the same time, to avoid repeating the mistakes of the global financial crisis, where public funds had to be used to rescue "too big to fail" financial institutions, the Financial Stability Board established international standards for the resolution mechanisms of financial institutions. Hong Kong is one of the few regions in Asia that has fully implemented mechanisms in line with these requirements. The HKMA's Resolution Mechanism Office is currently implementing the operational details of this mechanism, requiring banks to make structural changes to ensure that resolution plans can be effectively implemented when needed. Last year, the HKMA also introduced the "Loss Absorption Capacity Rules," and more related rules will be introduced in the future.

src_raw: 鑑於樓價持續上升，金管局未雨綢繆，在2009至2017年間共推出八輪逆周期措施，確保一旦地產市況逆轉，本港銀行體系有足夠的抗震能力應對衝擊。這些措施成效顯著：新造住宅平均按揭成數由2009年的64%降至2018年底的46%；平均供款與入息比率亦由2010年的41%下調至2018年底的34%。年內銀行信貸錄得4.4%的溫和增長，整體資產質素維持良好，零售銀行不良貸款比率進一步降至0.5%，遠低於國際及本港歷史平均水平。去年銀行業盈利持續增長，整體股東權益回報率連升兩年至13%；多家國際性銀行集團在本港的業務交出了不俗的成績表，成為集團盈利的重要支柱。
mt_raw: Given the sustained rise in property prices, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) took proactive measures, implementing eight rounds of countercyclical policies between 2009 and 2017 to ensure the local banking system had sufficient resilience to withstand potential shocks should the property market reverse. These measures proved highly effective: the average loan-to-value ratio for new residential mortgages fell from 64% in 2009 to 46% by the end of 2018; the average debt-to-income ratio also decreased from 41% in 2010 to 34% by the end of 2018. During the year, bank credit grew modestly by 4.4%, with overall asset quality remaining strong. The non-performing loan ratio for retail banking further declined to 0.5%, far below both international and local historical averages. Banking sector profitability continued to grow last year, with the overall return on equity rising for two consecutive years to 13%. Several international banking groups achieved strong performance in their Hong Kong operations, becoming key contributors to their group profits.

src_raw: 在監管銀行的行為操守方面，金管局在2010年增設銀行操守部，促進銀行公平待客，並加強保障消費者權益。要做到標本兼治，除了訂出各種針對銀行營運基本操守的監管要求外，我們近年來大力推動改革銀行文化，鼓勵銀行循管治、獎勵制度、評估與回饋機制三方面推動穩善文化，務求銀行內部做到上行下效，在根本上恢復、提升客戶對銀行的信任和尊重。繼2017年金管局向全港銀行提供具體的指引，金管局在2018年底進一步推出銀行文化的監管措施，包括要求銀行就企業文化和落實有關措施作出自我評估等，令穩善銀行文化的三大支柱能有效執行。
mt_raw: To enhance the ethical conduct of banks, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) established the Banking Conduct Division in 2010 to promote fair treatment of customers and strengthen consumer protection. To achieve both curative and preventative measures, in addition to setting regulatory requirements for fundamental banking operations, we have vigorously promoted cultural reform in recent years, encouraging banks to foster a culture of sound governance through three key areas: management, incentive systems, and evaluation and feedback mechanisms. This aims to ensure that such values permeate throughout the bank, fundamentally restoring and enhancing customer trust and respect. Following the HKMA’s provision of specific guidelines to all banks in Hong Kong in 2017, the HKMA further launched regulatory measures on bank culture at the end of 2018, including requiring banks to conduct self-assessments of their corporate culture and the implementation of related measures, ensuring the three pillars of sound banking culture are effectively implemented.

src_raw: 雖然互聯網和移動金融是全球趨勢，金管局去年仍繼續促進普及金融，照顧未能應用新科技的社群。例如我們連同香港銀行公會推動便利店推出長者透過「易辦事」免購物提款服務，有關便利店網絡已增至逾300家；我們並聯絡香港郵政在7家主要位於離島和新界的郵政局推出長者提款易服務。銀行業界響應金管局的建議，年內積極增加無障礙設施，提供傷健共融的銀行服務，例子之一是設有聲音導航的自動櫃員機數目一年內增加逾十倍至超過700部。另外，在金管局積極推動下，我們預期將會陸續有銀行在偏遠地區開設更多實體分行和增設流動銀行服務，便利市民。
mt_raw: Although the internet and mobile finance are global trends, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) continued to promote financial inclusion last year, ensuring that those unfamiliar with new technologies are not left behind. For example, in partnership with the Hong Kong Bankers' Association, we have expanded a convenient cash withdrawal service for seniors at over 300 local convenience stores, allowing them to access funds without making a purchase. We have also collaborated with Hong Kong Post to offer this service at seven post offices located on the outlying islands and in the New Territories. Responding to the HKMA’s recommendations, banks have significantly increased accessibility features, including more than tenfold the number of ATMs with voice navigation, now exceeding 700. Furthermore, the HKMA is encouraging banks to establish more physical branches and offer mobile banking services in remote areas, making banking more accessible to all citizens.

terms: {'交易量': 'transaction number', '共用二維碼': 'Common QR Code', '快速支付系統': 'Faster Payment System', '智慧銀行': 'Smart Banking', '智慧銀行新紀元': 'New Era of Smart Banking', '科技業界': 'technology business', '轉帳服務': 'fund transfer service', '金管局': 'HKMA', '金融科技': 'fintech', '銀行和科技業界': 'banking and information technology industries', '銀行帳戶': 'bank accounts', '零售快速支付系統': 'retail payment platform'}
src_raw: 金管局與銀行和科技業界緊密合作，在2017年9月啟動「智慧銀行新紀元」，推動香港金融科技發展和創新，為市民帶來嶄新的支付和銀行服務體驗。2018年的亮點，無疑是在9月正式開通的「轉數快」。它是全球獨一無二的零售快速支付系統，打破香港各種電子支付工具和銀行帳戶之間的屏障，讓市民享受全年無休的港元和人民幣即時轉帳服務。金管局還同步推出全球首個「共用二維碼」標準和應用程式，商戶可憑單個二維碼接通多個電子支付系統。「轉數快」推出以來深受市民歡迎，短短半年，登記紀錄已逾258萬個，日均交易量達6萬宗，平均每宗金額分別20,700港元和38,000元人民幣。
mt_raw: The Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) has worked closely with the banking and technology sectors to launch the "Smart Banking New Era" in September 2017, promoting the development and innovation of fintech in Hong Kong and bringing citizens a brand new payment and banking service experience. A highlight in 2018 was undoubtedly the official launch of "Faster Payments" in September. It is a unique retail fast payment system globally, breaking down barriers between various electronic payment tools and bank accounts in Hong Kong, allowing citizens to enjoy instant Hong Kong dollar and Renminbi transfers around the clock. The HKMA also simultaneously launched the world’s first “Common QR Code” standard and application, enabling merchants to connect multiple electronic payment systems through a single QR code. Since its launch, Faster Payments has been well-received by the public. In just six months, it has recorded over 2.58 million registrations, with an average daily transaction volume of 60,000, and an average transaction amount of HK$20,700 and RMB¥38,000 respectively.

mt_raw: In May last year, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) issued guidelines for the approval of virtual banks, immediately prompting 33 institutions to submit applications for virtual bank licenses. src_raw: 香港金融管理局是香港的中央銀行機構，主要職能有4項：在聯繫匯率制度的架構內維持貨幣穩定；促進金融體系（包括銀行體系）的穩定與健全；協助鞏固香港的國際金融中心地位，包括維持與發展香港的金融基建；以及管理外匯基金。
mt_raw: The Hong Kong Monetary Authority is the central banking institution of Hong Kong, with four primary functions: maintaining monetary stability under the linked exchange rate system; promoting the stability and soundness of the financial system (including the banking system); assisting in consolidating Hong Kong’s position as an international financial centre, including maintaining and developing Hong Kong’s financial infrastructure; and managing the Exchange Fund.

src_raw: 金融管理專員的權力、職能及責任由《外匯基金條例》、《銀行業條例》、《金融機構（處置機制）條例》、《存款保障計劃條例》、《支付系統及儲值支付工具條例》及其他有關條例明文規定。財政司司長與金融管理專員於2003年6月25日的互換函件，列載彼此在貨幣與金融事務方面的職能與責任的分配，亦披露財政司司長將若干權力轉授金融管理專員。有關函件為公開文件，可於金管局網站查閱。
mt_raw: The powers, functions, and responsibilities of the Financial Secretary and the Commissioner of Financial Services are explicitly stipulated in the Currency and Foreign Exchanges Ordinance, the Banking Ordinance, the Financial Institutions (Resolution Mechanism) Ordinance, the Deposit Protection Scheme Ordinance, the Payment Systems and Stored Value Facilities Ordinance, and other relevant ordinances. The exchange of letters between the Financial Secretary and the Commissioner of Financial Services dated June 25, 2003, outlines the allocation of functions and responsibilities between them in monetary and financial matters, and also reveals that the Financial Secretary has delegated certain powers to the Commissioner of Financial Services. This letter is a public document and can be accessed on the Hong Kong Monetary Authority's website.

src_raw: 財政司司長負責釐定香港的貨幣政策目標及貨幣體制：財政司司長於2003年6月25日致金融管理專員的函件中，訂明應透過貨幣發行局制度維持貨幣穩定，將港元匯率保持在約7.80港元兌1美元的水平。金融管理專員須自行負責達成貨幣政策目標，包括決定有關的策略、工具及執行方式，並負責維持香港貨幣制度的穩定與健全。
mt_raw: The Financial Secretary is responsible for determining Hong Kong’s monetary policy objectives and monetary system. In a letter dated June 25, 2003, addressed to the Hong Kong Monetary Authority, the Financial Secretary stipulated that monetary stability should be maintained through a currency board system, keeping the Hong Kong dollar exchange rate at approximately 7.80 HKD per USD. The Hong Kong Monetary Authority is responsible for achieving these monetary policy objectives, including determining the relevant strategies, instruments, and implementation methods, and for maintaining the stability and soundness of Hong Kong’s monetary system.

src_raw:
財政司司長在財經事務及庫務局局長的協助下，負責維持香港金融體系穩定與健全，以及保持香港的國際金融中心地位的政策。為推行這些政策，金融管理專員的職責包括：
- 促進銀行體系的整體穩定與有效運作
- 與其他有關機構與組織合作，發展債務市場
- 處理與法定紙幣及硬幣的發行及流通有關的事宜
- 透過發展支付、結算及交收系統，以及在適當情況下負責操作有關系統，促進金融基建的安全與效率
- 與其他有關機構與組織合作，促進對香港貨幣及金融體系的信心，並推行適當的發展市場措施，以協助加強香港金融服務的國際競爭力。
mt_raw:
The Financial Secretary, with the assistance of the Chief Executive of the Financial Services and Treasury Bureau, is responsible for policies aimed at maintaining the stability and soundness of Hong Kong's financial system and preserving Hong Kong's status as an international financial center. To implement these policies, the duties of the Financial Management Officer include:
- Promoting the overall stability and efficient operation of the banking system
- Collaborating with other relevant institutions and organizations to develop the debt market
- Handling matters related to the issuance and circulation of legal tender notes and coins
- Promoting the safety and efficiency of financial infrastructure by developing payment, settlement, and clearing systems, and operating such systems as appropriate
- Collaborating with other relevant institutions and organizations to enhance confidence in Hong Kong's currency and financial system, and implementing appropriate market development measures to help strengthen Hong Kong's international competitiveness in financial services.

src_raw:
金融管理專員由財政司司長委任，因此金管局透過財政司司長向公眾負責；而由於金管局的職權由立法會通過的法律制訂，因此金管局亦透過立法會向公眾負責。此外，金管局亦明白本身肩負更廣泛的責任，就是促進公眾對金管局角色及目標的認識，並密切留意社會人士所關注的事項。金管局在執行日常工作及與社會保持廣泛聯繫時，堅守盡力提高透明度及保持開放的政策。這項政策有兩大目標：
- 在顧及市場敏感性、商業秘密及機密資料披露的法定限制下，盡量使金融界及公眾充分了解金管局的工作；
- 確保金管局掌握社會脈搏，並對公眾意見作出適當回應。

src_raw: 金管局在透明度方面致力達致國際最高標準，與傳媒保持廣泛聯繫之餘，亦出版各種中英文期刊及專題刊物。金管局的雙語網站(www.hkma.gov.hk)除有專門環節列載經濟研究、統計資料、消費者資訊及其他課題外，還載有金管局出版的刊物、新聞稿、演辭及簡報會資料文件。此外，金管局又利用社交媒體平台，以能在數碼時代中更有效與公眾溝通。金管局辦事處設有資訊中心，分為圖書館及展覽館兩部分，每星期開放6日予公眾參觀及使用。金管局亦舉辦公眾教育活動，透過講座及資訊中心導賞服務，向公眾人士（特別是學生）講解金管局的工作，以及增進市民的金融知識。有關金管局的傳媒聯繫工作、刊物及公眾教育活動的詳細資料，見「機構職能」一章。
mt_raw: The Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) is committed to achieving the highest international standards in transparency. In addition to maintaining extensive contact with the media, the HKMA publishes a variety of journals and special publications in both Chinese and English. The HKMA's bilingual website (www.hkma.gov.hk) features dedicated sections for economic research, statistical data, consumer information, and other topics, as well as publications issued by the HKMA, press releases, speeches, and materials from briefing sessions. Furthermore, the HKMA utilizes social media platforms to communicate more effectively with the public in the digital age. The HKMA's office houses an information center, which is divided into a library and an exhibition hall, and is open to the public six days a week. The HKMA also organizes public education activities, through lectures and guided tours of the information center, to explain the HKMA's work to the public, especially students, and to enhance the public's financial knowledge. Detailed information on the HKMA's media relations, publications, and public education activities can be found in the chapter on "Institutional Functions."

src_raw: 金管局公布外匯基金及貨幣發行局帳目資料的次數，一直逐步增加，內容亦越趨詳細。金管局於1999年開始參與國際貨幣基金組織的中央銀行「數據公布特殊標準」計劃。金管局亦公布外匯基金諮詢委員會轄下貨幣發行委員會的會議紀錄，以及貨幣發行局制度運作報告。自1996年起，金管局網站亦載有銀行業監管政策及指引。
mt_raw: The number of times the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) publishes data on the Exchange Fund and Currency Board accounts has steadily increased, and the content has become more detailed. The HKMA began participating in the International Monetary Fund’s Special Data Dissemination Standard (SDDS) for central banks in 1999. The HKMA also publishes minutes of meetings of the Currency Board Committee under the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee, as well as reports on the operation of the Currency Board system. Since 1996, the HKMA website has also featured banking sector regulatory policies and guidelines.

src_raw: 金管局與立法會的關係對提高問責性及透明度非常重要。金管局總裁承諾每年3次向立法會財經事務委員會簡報金管局各項工作及政策，並回答有關查詢。此外，金管局代表亦會不時出席立法會財經事務委員會及法案委員會會議，闡釋及商討特別事項，以及協助議員審閱條例草案。
mt_raw: The relationship between the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) and the Legislative Council is crucial for enhancing accountability and transparency. The HKMA Chief Executive has pledged to brief the Legislative Council’s Finance Committee three times a year on the HKMA’s work and policies, and to answer related inquiries. Furthermore, representatives of the HKMA will also attend meetings of the Legislative Council’s Finance Committee and Bills Committee from time to time to explain and discuss specific matters, and to assist legislators in reviewing draft legislation.

src_raw: 財政司司長行使外匯基金的控制權時，會聽取外匯基金諮詢委員會的意見。外匯基金諮詢委員會根據《外匯基金條例》第3(1)條成立。該項條文訂明財政司司長行使對外匯基金的控制權時，須諮詢外匯基金諮詢委員會的意見。財政司司長為外匯基金諮詢委員會的當然主席，其他委員（包括金融管理專員）則以個人身分，由財政司司長根據香港特別行政區行政長官的授權委任。委員因各具專業知識及經驗而獲委任，他們的加入讓外匯基金諮詢委員會廣受裨益。委員的專業知識及經驗涵蓋貨幣、金融、經濟、投資、會計、管理、商業及法律等範疇。
mt_raw: The Financial Secretary exercises control over the Exchange Fund in consultation with the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee. The Exchange Fund Advisory Committee was established under section 3(1) of the Exchange Fund Ordinance. This provision stipulates that the Financial Secretary must consult the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee when exercising control over the Exchange Fund. The Financial Secretary serves as the ex officio chairman of the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee, while other members, including the Commissioner for Financial Management, are appointed individually by the Financial Secretary with the authorization of the Chief Executive of the Hong Kong Special Administrative Region. Members are appointed for their professional expertise and experience, which enhances the effectiveness of the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee. Their expertise covers areas such as currency, finance, economics, investment, accounting, management, commerce, and law.

mt_raw: The Foreign Exchange Fund Advisory Committee has established five specialized committees, which are responsible for overseeing specific aspects of the Hong Kong Monetary Authority's operations and reporting to and making recommendations to the Financial Secretary through the Foreign Exchange Fund Advisory Committee. In 2018, the Foreign Exchange Fund Advisory Committee held five meetings to discuss various matters related to the Hong Kong Monetary Authority's work, with most of these matters having been discussed in advance by the relevant specialized committees.

src_raw: 管治委員會監察金管局的表現，以及就金管局薪酬與服務條件、人力資源政策、財政預算、行政及管治事務，向外匯基金諮詢委員會提出建議。該委員會在2018年共召開5次會議，內容涵蓋金管局的開支預算、表現評估、年度薪酬檢討及策略性規劃事宜。該委員會亦審議金管局定期提交的工作報告。
mt_raw: The Governance Committee oversees the performance of the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) and provides recommendations to the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee on matters relating to the HKMA’s remuneration and service conditions, human resources policies, financial budget, and administrative and governance affairs. In 2018, the Committee held five meetings, covering topics including the HKMA’s expenditure budget, performance evaluation, annual remuneration review, and strategic planning. The Committee also reviewed the HKMA’s regularly submitted work reports.

src_raw: 審核委員會檢討金管局的財政匯報程序，並評核其內部管控制度是否足夠和有效，以及提交報告。審核委員會負責檢視金管局的財務報表，編製該等報表的組成項目與會計原則，並聯同外部及內部審計師查核其審計範疇與結果。審核委員會各委員在金管局並沒有任何行政職能。該委員會在2018年共召開2次會議，並審議風險委員會及內部審核處的工作報告。
mt_raw: The Audit Committee reviews the Hong Kong Monetary Authority's (HKMA) financial reporting procedures and evaluates the adequacy and effectiveness of its internal control systems, submitting reports as required. It is responsible for examining the HKMA's financial statements, the components of those statements, and the accounting principles used in their preparation, and for reviewing the audit scope and results in collaboration with external and internal auditors. Members of the Audit Committee do not hold any administrative positions within the HKMA. In 2018, the Committee held two meetings and reviewed the work reports of the Risk Committee and the Internal Audit Department.

src_raw: 貨幣發行委員會監察貨幣發行局制度的運作，並匯報這個作為香港聯繫匯率制度支柱的情況。該委員會負責確保貨幣發行局制度按照既定政策運作、提出改進該制度的建議，以及確保該制度的運作維持高透明度。金管局定期公布貨幣發行委員會的會議紀錄及提交該委員會的貨幣發行局制度運作報告。該委員會在2018年共召開4次會議。
mt_raw: The Currency Issuance Committee oversees the operation of the Currency Issuance System and reports on its role as a pillar of Hong Kong’s linked exchange rate system. The Committee is responsible for ensuring the System operates in accordance with established policies, proposing improvements to the System, and ensuring its operation maintains a high degree of transparency. The Hong Kong Monetary Authority regularly publishes the minutes of the Currency Issuance Committee meetings and the reports on the operation of the Currency Issuance System submitted to the Committee. The Committee held four meetings in 2018.

src_raw: 2018年香港經濟進一步擴張，不過按年增長速度由第1季的4.6%，逐步減慢至第4季的1.3%（表1），並拖累全年增長率由2017年的3.8%下降至3.0%。經濟擴張轉弱，反映本地需求增長減慢以及經濟持續受淨出口所拖累（圖1）。本地方面，私人消費在第1季強勁增長，但其後增長動力減弱，部分反映貿易保護主義升溫令不明朗因素增加，以及本地資產價格調整帶來的財富減值效應。由於營商信心脆弱，整體投資支出的增長速度亦放緩。外圍方面，貨品出口於首3季大致保持平穩，但在第4季隨着中美貿易摩擦加劇而顯著轉差。貨品進口亦因為出口帶動的需求轉弱而放緩。相比之下，服務輸出錄得較快的全年增長，部分是受惠於訪港旅遊業表現蓬勃，而服務輸入則由於運輸、商業及其他服務增長而得以大致維持增長動力。按淨額計，貿易差額由2017年的順差轉為2018年的小幅逆差，並拖累本地經濟增長。
mt_raw: Hong Kong’s economy continued to expand in 2018, although the year-on-year growth rate eased from 4.6% in the first quarter to 1.3% in the fourth quarter (Table 1), resulting in a decline in the full-year growth rate from 3.8% in 2017 to 3.0%. The weakening economic expansion reflected slower growth in domestic demand and the continuing drag from net exports (Figure 1). Domestically, private consumption grew strongly in the first quarter but subsequently lost steam, partly due to rising uncertainty stemming from increasing trade protectionism and the impact of local asset price adjustments on wealth. Overall investment expenditure also moderated as business confidence remained weak. Externally, merchandise exports remained relatively stable in the first three quarters but deteriorated significantly in the fourth quarter as US-China trade tensions escalated. Merchandise imports also slowed, reflecting weaker export-driven demand. In contrast, service exports recorded faster annual growth, benefiting in part from a thriving inbound tourism sector, while service imports maintained growth largely due to increases in transport, commercial, and other services. In net terms, the trade balance shifted from a surplus in 2017 to a small deficit in 2018, dampening local economic growth.

src_raw: 主要受到港元與美元負息差下的套息活動所影響，港元兌美元匯率在2018年大致回軟。尤其弱方兌換保證在4月、5月及8月被觸發，促使金管局按照聯繫匯率制度（聯匯制度）所定，在7.85港元兌1美元的水平，向銀行購入港元及沽出美元。按照聯匯制度的設計，港元貨幣基礎因而收縮，表示銀行同業流動性減少，再加上市場預期美國加息，導致港元銀行同業拆息整體上升。由於銀行體系資金成本上升，銀行於9月下旬在美國聯邦基金利率目標區間上調後，調高最優惠貸款利率12.5至25基點。信貸增長方面，部分由於本地經濟增長放緩以及對外貿易表現轉弱，整體銀行貸款的增幅由2017年的16.1%，顯著減慢至2018年的4.4%。
mt_raw: The Hong Kong dollar exchange rate against the US dollar depreciated throughout 2018, largely due to arbitrage activity stemming from the negative interest rate differential between the two currencies. The Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) was prompted to intervene in the market in April, May, and August, triggered by the lower limit of the linked exchange rate system.  The HKMA purchased Hong Kong dollars and sold US dollars at the rate of 7.85 HKD per 1 USD, as stipulated by the system. This intervention contracted the Hong Kong dollar monetary base, reducing interbank liquidity.  Combined with expectations of US interest rate increases, this led to a rise in Hong Kong dollar interbank offered rates (HIBOR).  As funding costs for banks increased, they raised their prime lending rates by 12.5 to 25 basis points in late September following the increase in the US federal funds rate target range.  Regarding credit growth, the overall growth rate of bank loans slowed significantly from 16.1% in 2017 to 4.4% in 2018, partly attributable to slower local economic growth and weaker external trade performance.

src_raw: 通脹壓力於2018年略為增加。剔除政府一次性紓緩措施的影響後，基本通脹率由2017年的1.7%低位，升至2018年的2.6%，不過仍屬於溫和水平。當中的住屋租金組成項目增幅較快，反映較早前新簽訂私人住宅租金上升的影響（圖2）。更廣泛的分析顯示，名義勞工成本及商用物業租金增長略為加快，令本地成本壓力更趨明顯。隨着香港部分主要進口來源地通脹上升，進口價格通脹亦因而攀升。
mt_raw: Inflationary pressure slightly increased in 2018. Excluding the impact of one-off government relief measures, the underlying inflation rate rose from 1.7% in 2017 to 2.6% in 2018, although it remained at a moderate level. The housing rental component saw a faster increase, reflecting the impact of earlier rises in private residential rents (Figure 2). A broader analysis showed that nominal labor costs and commercial property rents grew slightly faster, making local cost pressures more pronounced. As inflation rose in some major import sources for Hong Kong, import price inflation also increased accordingly.

src_raw: 勞工市場狀況在2018年保持穩健（圖3）。失業率由2017年全年的3.1%下降至2018年的2.8%，是自1997年以來的最低水平。當中大部分主要服務行業的失業率都有所回落，特別是住宿及膳食服務業的跌幅更為顯著。隨着總就業人數及私營機構職位空缺進一步增加，整體勞工需求持續增強，而且勞動人口參與率亦輕微上升。在勞工市場狀況趨緊下，實質工資及收入進一步增加。
mt_raw: The labor market conditions remained stable in 2018 (Figure 3). The unemployment rate decreased from 3.1% in 2017 to 2.8% in 2018, the lowest level since 1997. Unemployment rates fell in most major service industries, particularly significantly in the accommodation and food services sector. With further increases in total employment and private sector job vacancies, overall labor demand continued to strengthen, and the labor force participation rate also rose slightly. Amidst tightening labor market conditions, real wages and incomes increased further.

src_raw: 香港股市走勢在2018年大幅逆轉。恒生指數在2017年強勁的上升動力帶動下，於2018年1月升上33,484點的歷史高位（圖4）。然而，隨着主要中央銀行收緊貨幣政策、中美貿易摩擦加劇及本地經濟增長放緩引起投資者的憂慮，市場的樂觀情緒急劇逆轉。恒生指數在10月下挫至24,586點的低位，在年底則收報25,846點，較一年前下跌13.6%。然而，平均每日成交額則由2017年的882億港元上升至1,074億港元，本港首次公開招股集資總額亦因數間從事新興及創科產業的企業上市而大幅增加。
mt_raw: The Hong Kong stock market experienced a significant reversal in 2018. Driven by strong upward momentum from 2017, the Hang Seng Index reached a historical high of 33,484 points in January 2018 (Figure 4). However, as major central banks tightened monetary policy, Sino-U.S. trade tensions escalated, and concerns arose over the slowdown in local economic growth, market optimism quickly reversed. The Hang Seng Index fell to a low of 24,586 points in October and closed at 25,846 points by year-end, marking a 13.6% decline from the previous year. However, average daily turnover rose from HKD 882 billion in 2017 to HKD 1,074 billion, while the total fundraising from initial public offerings (IPOs) in Hong Kong also surged significantly due to the listing of several companies in emerging and innovative industries.

src_raw: 住宅物業市場在2018年上半年保持暢旺，不過在下半年隨着中美貿易摩擦加劇、環球股市調整及本港最優惠利率上升而有所降溫。整體樓價在7月至12月期間由高位回落9%，然而全年計仍錄得2%的升幅（圖4）。由於一手及二手市場的買賣活動於下半年顯著減少，所以物業成交量在2018年亦較前一年下跌7%至57,247宗。此外，置業負擔能力仍然偏緊，樓價與收入比率以及收入槓桿比率分別為17.0及75.7，兩者均遠高於長期平均水平。另一方面，非住宅物業價格在2018年整體上升，惟接近年底時稍見回落。全年計，價格及租金均進一步上升，租金回報率則維持在低位。
mt_raw: The residential property market remained robust in the first half of 2018, but cooled in the second half amid escalating Sino-U.S. trade tensions, global stock market adjustments, and rising Hong Kong prime lending rates. Overall property prices fell by 9% from their peak between July and December, although they still recorded a 2% increase for the year (Figure 4). Due to significantly reduced buying and selling activities in both new and second-hand markets in the second half of the year, property transaction volumes in 2018 dropped 7% compared to the previous year, totaling 57,247 transactions. Additionally, housing affordability remained tight, with price-to-income and income leverage ratios at 17.0 and 75.7 respectively, both far above long-term averages. On the other hand, non-residential property prices rose overall in 2018, though they slightly declined toward the end of the year. For the full year, both prices and rents increased further, while rental yields remained at low levels.

src_raw: 由於全球經濟增長放緩，預期2019年香港經濟增長將會減慢。尤其外圍環境充滿挑戰，預期香港出口表現仍會受壓。本地方面，雖然失業率低企及家庭收入增加將繼續支撐私人消費，但部分由於消費信心減弱及較早前的資產價格調整帶來的財富減值效應的影響，預期私人消費增長步伐會放緩。固定資本形成方面，雖然隨着房屋供應增加，樓宇及建造活動應會穩步增長，但面對經濟不明朗因素增加，企業對於資本投資可能會變得更為審慎。政府預測2019年實質本地生產總值增長率介乎2至3%之間，私營機構分析員的最新預測增幅則平均為2.3%。
mt_raw: Due to the slowdown in global economic growth, Hong Kong's economic growth is expected to decelerate in 2019. Particularly, the external environment remains challenging, and Hong Kong's export performance is still expected to face pressure. Locally, although low unemployment rates and rising household incomes will continue to support private consumption, the growth momentum of private consumption is anticipated to slow down partly due to weakened consumer confidence and the wealth erosion effects from earlier asset price adjustments. In terms of fixed capital formation, although housing supply increases should lead to steady growth in property and construction activities, businesses may become more cautious about capital investment amid heightened economic uncertainties. The government forecasts real local GDP growth for 2019 to range between 2% and 3%, while the latest average projections from private sector analysts stand at 2.3%.

The average liquidity maintenance ratio for Category 2 institutions was 54.3%, also significantly higher than the 25% statutory minimum requirement (Figure 8).

src_raw: 香港貨幣政策的主要目標是維持貨幣穩定，即確保港元匯價穩定，使港元在外匯市場兌美元的匯率保持在7.75至7.85港元兌1美元的區間內。該貨幣體制主要採用貨幣發行局制度，規定由外匯基金所持的美元儲備向貨幣基礎提供最少百分之百的支持；貨幣基礎若有變動，美元儲備亦必須作出相應增減，與貨幣基礎的變動百分之百配合。
mt_raw: The primary objective of Hong Kong's monetary policy is to maintain currency stability, which entails ensuring the stability of the Hong Kong dollar exchange rate, keeping the exchange rate of the Hong Kong dollar against the US dollar within a range of 7.75 to 7.85 Hong Kong dollars per US dollar in the foreign exchange market. This currency system mainly adopts a currency board arrangement, stipulating that the US dollar reserves held by the Exchange Fund must provide at least 100% support for the monetary base; whenever the monetary base changes, the US dollar reserves must also be correspondingly increased or decreased in exact proportion to the changes in the monetary base.

src_raw: 金管局透過自動利率調節機制及履行兌換保證的堅決承諾來維持港元匯率的穩定。若市場對港元的需求大過供應，令市場匯率轉強至7.75港元兌1美元的強方兌換保證匯率，金管局會向銀行沽出港元、買入美元，使總結餘增加及港元利率下跌，從而令港元匯率從強方兌換保證匯率水平回復至7.75到7.85的兌換範圍內。相反，若港元供過於求，令市場匯率轉弱至7.85港元兌1美元的弱方兌換保證匯率，金管局會向銀行買入港元，使總結餘減少及推高港元利率，港元匯率隨之由弱方兌換保證匯率水平回復至兌換範圍內。
mt_raw: The Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) maintains the stability of the Hong Kong dollar exchange rate through an automatic interest rate adjustment mechanism and its firm commitment to the exchange rate guarantee. When market demand for the Hong Kong dollar exceeds supply, causing the exchange rate to strengthen towards the upper limit of the band at 7.75 HKD per US dollar, the HKMA sells Hong Kong dollars and buys US dollars from banks, increasing the aggregate balance and lowering Hong Kong dollar interest rates. This action brings the exchange rate back within the range of 7.75 to 7.85 HKD per US dollar. Conversely, if the supply of Hong Kong dollars exceeds demand, causing the exchange rate to weaken towards the lower limit of the band at 7.85 HKD per US dollar, the HKMA buys Hong Kong dollars from banks, reducing the aggregate balance and raising Hong Kong dollar interest rates, thereby restoring the exchange rate to within the established range.

src_raw: 在港元與美元負息差擴闊帶動套息活動的背景下，港元匯率自年初以來逐步轉弱。於4月12日，弱方兌換保證在2005年訂於7.85水平以來首度被觸發。全年計，弱方兌換保證在2018年合共被觸發27次，分別在4月被觸發13次，5月6次，以及8月8次。儘管如此，港元交易仍然暢順有序，港元匯率於4月中至9月中在弱方兌換保證匯率7.85附近徘徊（圖1）。其後港元匯率略為轉強，部分反映假期、季結及年結臨近，銀行同業流動性收緊，帶動部分套息交易平倉。同時，某程度上港元亦受到11月初股市氣氛好轉支持。整體而言，港元外匯市場在2018年全年正常運作。
mt_raw: Against the backdrop of a widening negative interest rate differential between the Hong Kong dollar and the US dollar, which spurred carry trade activity, the Hong Kong dollar exchange rate has gradually weakened since the beginning of the year. On April 12th, the exchange rate guarantee, established at 7.85 since 2005, was activated for the first time. Throughout 2018, the guarantee was triggered a total of 27 times, including 13 times in April, 6 times in May, and 8 times in August. Despite these interventions, Hong Kong dollar transactions remained smooth and orderly, with the exchange rate fluctuating around the 7.85 level from mid-April to mid-September (Figure 1). Subsequently, the Hong Kong dollar strengthened slightly, partly reflecting tighter interbank liquidity as holidays, quarter-end, and year-end approached, prompting the unwinding of some carry trade positions. The Hong Kong dollar also benefited to some extent from improved stock market sentiment in early November. Overall, the Hong Kong dollar foreign exchange market functioned normally throughout 2018.

src_raw: 由於弱方兌換保證被觸發，總結餘與未償還外匯基金票據及債券總額由2017年底的12,268億港元，下降至2018年底的11,362億港元（圖2）。年內，金管局按照聯繫匯率制度（聯匯制度）的設計，應銀行要求於弱方兌換保證匯率7.85的水平，購入合共1,035億港元，總結餘因而由2017年底的1,798億港元下降至2018年底的764億港元。年內未償還外匯基金票據及債券總額沒有明顯變動。貨幣基礎仍然由外匯儲備提供十足支持。
mt_raw: As a result of the triggering of the weak-side Convertibility Arrangement, the aggregate balance and the total outstanding foreign exchange fund notes and bonds decreased from HKD 12,268 billion at the end of 2017 to HKD 11,362 billion at the end of 2018 (Figure 2). During the year, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority, in accordance with the design of the Linked Exchange Rate System, purchased a total of HKD 1,035 billion at the weak-side Convertibility Arrangement exchange rate of 7.85 in response to bank requests, causing the aggregate balance to decline from HKD 1,798 billion at the end of 2017 to HKD 764 billion at the end of 2018. The total outstanding foreign exchange fund notes and bonds showed no significant change during the year. The monetary base remained fully supported by the exchange fund reserve.

src_raw: 由於觸發弱方兌換保證後銀行同業流動性減少，以及市場預期美國加息，香港銀行同業拆息在2018年內普遍上升。受新股集資活動相關的資金需求增加及季節性流動資金需求帶動，短期銀行同業拆息更出現較大波幅（圖3）。整體而言，短期銀行同業拆息在2018年大致維持在低於基本利率的水平。鑑於銀行體系資金成本上升，在9月下旬美國聯邦基金利率目標範圍上調後，銀行調高最優惠貸款利率12.5至25基點。
mt_raw: Due to reduced interbank liquidity following the triggering of the weak-side exchange guarantee and market expectations of U.S. interest rate hikes, Hong Kong interbank offered rates (HIBOR) generally rose throughout 2018. Short-term HIBOR experienced greater volatility (Figure 3), driven by increased funding demand related to new equity fundraising activities and seasonal liquidity needs. Overall, short-term HIBOR remained largely below the basic interest rate level during 2018. In response to rising funding costs within the banking system, banks raised their prime lending rates by 12.5 to 25 basis points following the upward adjustment of the U.S. federal funds rate target range in late September.

src_raw: 因應年內美國聯邦基金利率目標範圍4次合共上調100基點，由1.25至1.50厘上調至2.25至2.50厘，基本利率於3月22日、6月14日、9月27日及12月20日合共上調100基點，由1.75厘上調至2.75厘。基本利率的調整是按照2009年3月26日宣布的經修訂計算公式作出。按照該公式，基本利率定於美國聯邦基金利率目標範圍下限加50基點的水平，或隔夜與1個月香港銀行同業拆息的5天移動平均數的平均值水平，以兩者中較高者為準。
mt_raw: In response to four rate hikes totaling 100 basis points in the US federal funds rate target range this year, which was raised from 1.25 to 1.50 percent to 2.25 to 2.50 percent, the basic interest rate was increased by a total of 100 basis points on March 22, June 14, September 27, and December 20, moving from 1.75 percent to 2.75 percent. The adjustments to the basic interest rate were made in accordance with the revised calculation formula announced on March 26, 2009. Under this formula, the basic interest rate is set at the level of either the lower bound of the US federal funds rate target range plus 50 basis points, or the average of the 5-day moving average of overnight and 1-month Hong Kong Interbank Offered Rate (HIBOR), whichever is higher.

The 12-month forward rate reached -620 points in mid-April (Figure 4). Subsequently, as the negative interest rate differential narrowed, the discount slightly decreased before widening again in the fourth quarter. Overall, the Hong Kong money market continued to operate normally. Discount window lending increased from HKD 10.3 billion in 2017 to HKD 40.2 billion in 2018.

src_raw: 聯匯制度自1983年實施以來，直是維持香港貨幣及金融穩定的重要基石；並在多次區內以至全球金融危機考驗下，展現其承受強大衝擊的能力。由於港元轉弱，作為聯匯制度設計一部分的弱方兌換保證於4月、5月及8月被多次觸發。資金流出港元，是香港利率正常化的必經過程，亦是聯匯制度下的正常運作。為增進各界對有關操作及聯匯制度機制的了解，金管局致力向公眾闡釋聯匯制度的技術細節，並展示香港金融體系應對衝擊的能力。政府亦堅決維持聯匯制度。外匯及貨幣市場保持穩定，進一步鞏固公眾對政府的承擔，以及港元作為支付及保值貨幣的信心。國際貨幣基金組織在與香港進行2018年第四條磋商時，重申對聯匯制度的支持，並指出聯匯制度仍然是最適合香港的貨幣制度，是維持穩定的支柱，有助確保經濟持續增長、維持競爭力及促進龐大的金融服務業暢順運作。
mt_raw: The linked exchange rate system, implemented since 1983, has consistently served as a vital cornerstone for maintaining Hong Kong's monetary and financial stability. It has repeatedly demonstrated its resilience in withstanding significant shocks during multiple regional and global financial crises. The weak-side exchange guarantee, an integral component of the system, was triggered multiple times in April, May, and August due to the weakening of the Hong Kong dollar. Capital outflows from the Hong Kong dollar represent an inevitable phase in the normalization of interest rates and constitute normal operations under the linked exchange rate system. To enhance public understanding of these mechanisms and the technical intricacies of the system, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority has actively explained its details to the public, showcasing the resilience of Hong Kong's financial system in responding to shocks. The government remains resolute in its commitment to maintaining the linked exchange rate system. The stability of foreign exchange and money markets further reinforces public confidence in the government's dedication and in the Hong Kong dollar's role as a medium of payment and store of value. During its 2018 Article IV consultation with Hong Kong, the International Monetary Fund reaffirmed its support for the linked exchange rate system, emphasizing that it remains the most suitable monetary framework for Hong Kong—a pillar of stability that ensures sustained economic growth, maintains competitiveness, and facilitates the smooth operation of the city's extensive financial services sector.

src_raw: 鑑於穩健的銀行體系對聯匯制度的正常運作具關鍵作用，金管局繼續密切監察銀行的信用、流動性及利率風險管理，以及壓力測試結果，並維持對銀行的企業、物業相關及內地相關貸款的監管，以確保銀行體系具備承受衝擊的能力。銀行持有大量外匯基金票據及債券，可經貼現窗用作換取港元流動資金，為利率大幅波動的情況提供有效緩衝。金管局隨時準備透過調整外匯基金票據及債券的發行量以提供額外流動性，以應對資金可能急劇流出港元的情況。金管局亦提醒市民審慎管理市場及利率風險，並為可能出現的市場波動作好準備。
mt_raw: Given that a sound banking system is crucial for the normal operation of the linked exchange rate system, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) continues to closely monitor banks' credit, liquidity, and interest rate risk management, as well as the results of stress tests, and maintains supervision of banks' corporate, property-related, and mainland China-related lending to ensure the banking system's resilience to shocks. Banks hold substantial amounts of foreign exchange fund notes and bonds, which can be used through the discount window to obtain Hong Kong dollar liquidity, providing an effective buffer against significant interest rate fluctuations. The HKMA is prepared at all times to provide additional liquidity by adjusting the issuance volume of foreign exchange fund notes and bonds to address potential sharp outflows of Hong Kong dollar funds. The HKMA also reminds the public to prudently manage market and interest rate risks and to prepare for possible market volatility.

src_raw: 為提高貨幣發行局帳目的透明度，自1998年10月起，外匯基金已有部分資產被指定用作支持貨幣基礎。支持比率（即支持資產相對貨幣基礎的比率）於2018年在107.8至109.9%之間上落，並無觸及上限或下限。該比率於12月31日為109.9%（圖5）。在聯匯制度下，雖然已指定某些外匯基金資產作為支持組合，但外匯基金的全部資產均可用作支持港元匯率。外匯基金的龐大財政資源，能在面對突如其來的衝擊時為保障香港的貨幣及金融穩定提供強力後盾。
mt_raw: To enhance the transparency of the Hong Kong Monetary Authority's accounts, certain assets of the Exchange Fund have been designated to support the currency base since October 1998. The support ratio—the ratio of supporting assets to the currency base—fluctuated between 107.8% and 109.9% in 2018, without reaching either the upper or lower limits. The ratio stood at 109.9% as of December 31 (Figure 5). Under the linked exchange rate system, while certain Exchange Fund assets have been designated as part of the support portfolio, the Fund’s entire asset base can be used to support the Hong Kong dollar exchange rate. The Exchange Fund’s substantial financial resources provide a strong safeguard for Hong Kong’s monetary and financial stability in the face of sudden shocks.

src_raw: 外匯基金諮詢委員會轄下的貨幣發行委員會（貨幣發行委員會）負責監察和探討與香港貨幣及金融穩定有關的課題。在2018年，貨幣發行委員會探討的課題包括多國央行聯合退出非常規貨幣政策對在香港的境外銀行美元貸款供應造成的潛在影響、港元貨幣需求的利率敏感度，以及聯匯制度自3項優化措施以來的運作機制及理論。貨幣發行委員會會議紀錄及金管局向其呈交的貨幣發行局制度運作報告，均載於金管局網站。
mt_raw: The Monetary Policy Committee, operating under the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee, is responsible for monitoring and examining issues relating to Hong Kong’s monetary and financial stability. In 2018, the Committee’s work included assessing the potential impact of coordinated exits from unconventional monetary policies by multiple central banks on the supply of U.S. dollar loans from foreign banks in Hong Kong, the interest rate sensitivity of demand for Hong Kong dollars, and the operational mechanisms and theoretical underpinnings of the Linked Exchange Rate System following the implementation of three improvements. Meeting minutes of the Monetary Policy Committee and the reports on the operation of the Linked Exchange Rate System submitted by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) are available on the HKMA website.

src_raw: 香港金融研究中心（研究中心）繼續支持貨幣政策、銀行業及金融範疇的研究工作。過去4年，研究中心更着重政策方面的研究，從所舉辦的研討會及訪問學者計劃尤其可見一斑。一方面，研究中心與主要中央銀行及政策研究機構合作，聯合舉辦更多政策相關的研討會。另一方面，在2016年推出專題研究學者計劃，支持更多與金管局政策制定相關的研究項目。
mt_raw: The Hong Kong Institute for Monetary Policy (the Research Centre) continues to support research work in monetary policy, banking, and finance. Over the past four years, the Research Centre has particularly focused on policy-related research, which is evident in the seminars it has organized and the visiting scholar program. On one hand, the Research Centre has collaborated with major central banks and policy research institutions to co-host more policy-related seminars. On the other hand, it launched the Focused Research Scholar Scheme in 2016 to support more research projects related to the Hong Kong Monetary Authority’s policy formulation.

src_raw:
在2018年，研究中心合共邀請16位研究學者到訪，並發表了25份研究論文。年內研究中心亦舉辦了4場國際研討會：
- 於1月舉行的「第9屆中國經濟年度國際研討會」，主題為「中國房地產市場及其對經濟與金融穩定的影響」。研討會由研究中心、國務院發展研究中心市場經濟研究所及中國人民銀行金融研究所合辦，集中討論內地房地產市場相關的課題及風險。
- 於10月舉行由金管局及國際結算銀行合辦的「匯率與貨幣政策框架」研討會。研討會為國際結算銀行於香港的亞太區辦事處成立20周年的慶祝活動之一，旨在探討匯率在貨幣政策框架中的角色。
- 於11月舉行的「2018年中央銀行金融市場微結構的年度研討會」。研討會討論金融市場微結構理論研究、實證研究結果及近期發展相關的政策影響。
- 於11月舉行由金管局、歐洲中央銀行及美國聯邦儲備委員會合辦的「中國經濟的新時代」中國專家網絡研討會。研討會討論內地經濟正面對的迫切問題及其對全球經濟的影響，並特別着重與中央銀行決策者相關的政策議題。這是中國專家網絡研討會首次在歐洲以外地區舉行。
mt_raw:
In 2018, the research center invited a total of 16 scholars for visits and published 25 research papers. During the year, the research center also hosted four international conferences:
- The “9th Annual International Conference on China’s Economy,” held in January, with the theme “China’s Real Estate Market and Its Impact on Economic and Financial Stability.” The conference was jointly organized by the research center, the Market Economics Institute of the State Council Development Research Center, and the Financial Research Institute of the People’s Bank of China, focusing on issues and risks related to the mainland’s real estate market.
- The “Exchange Rate and Monetary Policy Framework” conference, held in October and co-organized by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority and the Bank for International Settlements. The conference was one of the events celebrating the 20th anniversary of the Bank for International Settlements’ Hong Kong Regional Office and aimed to explore the role of exchange rates in monetary policy frameworks.
- The “2018 Annual Conference on Central Bank Financial Market Microstructure,” held in November. The conference discussed theoretical research on financial market microstructure, empirical research findings, and policy implications of recent developments.
- The “New Era of China’s Economy” China Experts Network Conference, held in November and co-organized by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority, the European Central Bank, and the U.S. Federal Reserve. The conference discussed pressing issues facing the mainland economy and their impact on the global economy, with particular emphasis on policy issues relevant to central bank decision-makers. This was the first time the China Experts Network Conference was held outside of Europe.

src_raw: 儘管環球經濟及金融市場的不確定性增加，2018年香港銀行體系維持穩健。認可機構的流動性及信用風險管理制度的成效繼續是金管局年內的監管重點。鑑於網絡威脅持續增加，以及銀行業更廣泛使用金融科技，金管局加強對認可機構科技風險管理及業務操作恢復能力的監管。金管局亦於5月發出《虛擬銀行的認可》指引修訂本，並開始處理虛擬銀行認可申請。在操守監管方面，金管局採取進一步措施，加強監管認可機構銷售投資及保險產品的手法、促進為殘疾人士提供無障礙銀行服務，以及推動以客為本的企業文化。
mt_raw: Despite increased global economic and financial market uncertainties, the banking system in Hong Kong remained resilient in 2018. The effectiveness of liquidity and credit risk management systems at authorized institutions continued to be a key regulatory focus for the HKMA throughout the year. Given the continuing rise in cyber threats and the banking sector’s wider adoption of financial technology, the HKMA strengthened its supervision of authorized institutions’ technology risk management and business operations recovery capabilities. The HKMA also issued a revised Guideline on Authorization of Virtual Banks in May and began processing applications for virtual bank authorization. In conduct regulation, the HKMA took further steps to enhance the supervision of authorized institutions’ sales practices for investment and insurance products, promote accessible banking services for people with disabilities, and foster a customer-centric corporate culture.

src_raw: 隨着金融罪行越趨複雜及全球化，金管局繼續借助新科技及風險為本方法，加強香港打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集制度的應對能力。金管局在香港落實國際監管標準方面進展理想，其中包括資本充足標準、披露標準、流動性標準及大額風險承擔限額。此外，金管局亦加強與銀行業的溝通接觸，確保在監管成效與市場發展兩者間取得適當平衡。
mt_raw: As financial crimes become increasingly complex and globalized, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) continues to enhance Hong Kong's capacity to combat money laundering and terrorist financing through the adoption of new technologies and a risk-based approach. The HKMA has made satisfactory progress in implementing international regulatory standards in Hong Kong, including capital adequacy standards, disclosure standards, liquidity standards, and limits on large risk exposures. Additionally, the HKMA has strengthened communication with the banking sector to ensure an appropriate balance between regulatory effectiveness and market development.

src_raw: 金管局的整體目標之一是促進銀行體系的安全及穩定。要達致這個目標，實有賴建立及維持具高度應對能力且能為香港經濟提供所需關鍵金融服務的金融體系。
mt_raw: One of the Hong Kong Monetary Authority's overall objectives is to promote the safety and stability of the banking system. Achieving this goal depends on establishing and maintaining a financial system with a high level of resilience and capable of providing the essential financial services needed by the Hong Kong economy.

src_raw: 銀行可能因其營運方式，甚或在極端情況下因失序地倒閉而影響銀行體系的穩定。作為監管當局，金融管理專員在保障金融穩定方面擔當重要角色，確保銀行有能力抵禦衝擊、對危機作出應對，並自危機中恢復常態，以最終有助防止出現倒閉。金融管理專員負責對銀行進行審慎監管，以及認可香港的持牌銀行、有限制牌照銀行及接受存款公司（統稱「認可機構」）。金融管理專員亦負責某些金融市場基建的指定及監管。
mt_raw: Banks can affect the stability of the banking system through their operational practices, or even through disorderly failure in extreme circumstances. As the regulator, the Financial Secretary plays a vital role in safeguarding financial stability by ensuring banks are able to withstand shocks, respond to crises, and recover from them, ultimately helping to prevent failures. The Financial Secretary is responsible for the prudential supervision of banks, as well as the authorization of licensed banks, restricted license banks and deposit-taking companies in Hong Kong (collectively referred to as “authorized institutions”). The Financial Secretary is also responsible for the designation and regulation of certain financial market infrastructure.

src_raw: 然而，金融管理專員不能確保金融體系全無風險，香港的審慎監管制度亦非為了確保「零風險」而設。作為其中一個處置機制當局，金融管理專員力求確保一旦有認可機構不再可持續經營，即能有序地處理其倒閉。為此，香港已設立金融機構處置機制，金融管理專員於該機制之下作為包括認可機構在內的若干金融機構的處置機制當局。為建立運作暢順的香港處置機制，必須制定處置法例及政策標準、進行處置規劃以清除認可機構處置可行性的障礙，以及建立金管局處置無法經營的認可機構的運作能力。為有效執行上述工作，金管局需要採納與國際一致及協調的方法。
mt_raw: However, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) cannot guarantee a risk-free financial system, and Hong Kong’s prudential regulatory regime is not designed to ensure “zero risk.” As a resolution authority, the HKMA strives to ensure that if a licensed financial institution becomes unsustainable, its failure can be managed in an orderly fashion. To this end, Hong Kong has established a financial institution resolution framework, under which the HKMA serves as the resolution authority for certain financial institutions, including licensed institutions. To establish a smoothly functioning resolution framework in Hong Kong, it is essential to develop resolution legislation and policy standards, conduct resolution planning to address challenges to resolvability, and build the HKMA’s operational capabilities to resolve failing institutions. To effectively carry out these tasks, the HKMA needs to adopt approaches consistent with and coordinated with international standards.

src_raw: 金管局在2018年共進行187次非現場審查，涵蓋範圍廣泛，包括認可機構的CAMEL評級、企業管治、業務操作及風險管理，以及認可機構應對金融科技發展的業務策略。為繼續加強認可機構的風險管治水平，金管局與認可機構董事局或董事局轄下委員會共舉行27次會議，並跟進認可機構實施企業管治指引的進度。此外，金管局與認可機構及其外聘核數師共舉行28次三方聯席會議。
mt_raw: In 2018, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) conducted a total of 187 off-site reviews, covering a wide range of areas including the CAMEL ratings of authorized institutions, corporate governance, business operations and risk management, as well as the business strategies of authorized institutions in response to the development of financial technology. To continue enhancing the risk governance standards of authorized institutions, the HKMA held 27 meetings with the boards of directors or their committees of authorized institutions, and monitored the progress of authorized institutions in implementing corporate governance guidelines. In addition, the HKMA held 28 trilateral meetings involving authorized institutions and their external auditors.

src_raw: 除了非現場審查工作外，金管局繼續進行定期現場審查，並以專題評估作為配合，以審視被評估為較高風險的範疇。金管局於年內共進行392次現場審查及專題評估，並繼續以信用風險管理作為審查與評估的主要重點。其他重點為科技風險及業務操作風險管理，以及打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集管控措施。金管局亦增加針對流動性與市場風險管理，以及巴塞爾資本充足架構的實施情況的現場審查及專題評估次數。專項審查小組亦對認可機構的證券、投資產品、保險及強制性公積金（強積金）相關業務進行現場審查。
mt_raw: In addition to off-site reviews, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) continues to conduct regular on-site inspections, complemented by thematic assessments to evaluate areas considered higher risk. During the year, the HKMA carried out a total of 392 on-site inspections and thematic assessments, with a primary focus on credit risk management. Other key areas of emphasis included technology risk and operational risk management, as well as measures to combat money laundering and terrorist financing. The HKMA also increased the number of on-site inspections and thematic assessments relating to liquidity and market risk management, and the implementation of the Basel capital adequacy framework. Dedicated review teams also conducted on-site inspections of authorized institutions’ businesses involving securities, investment products, insurance, and mandatory provident fund (MPF) matters.

mt_raw: The asset quality of accredited institutions remained stable in 2018. The specific classified loan ratio for retail banks decreased from 0.56% at the end of 2017 to 0.50% at the end of 2018, far below the long-term average of 2.1% since 2000; during the same period, the specific classified loan ratio for the overall banking sector decreased from 0.68% to 0.55%. Regarding mainland-related loans, the specific classified loan ratio for retail banks decreased from 0.75% to 0.63% in 2018, while the relevant ratio for the overall banking sector also decreased from 0.67% a year earlier to 0.54%.

src_raw: 年內金管局加強監管，確保認可機構繼續採取審慎的信用風險管理準則。尤其金管局更主動了解大型企業的背景及結構，從而加強企業信用風險的監察制度。此外，金管局亦進行以主要信用風險管理監控措施為重點的專題評估，例如大型企業貸款的批核準則及風險管理、貸款分類及撥備制度、信用風險管治架構、地產發展商貸款的風險管理、有抵押貸款及保單抵押貸款等。
mt_raw: Within the year, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) strengthened its supervision to ensure that authorized institutions continue to adopt prudent credit risk management practices. In particular, the HKMA has taken a more proactive approach to understanding the background and structure of large corporations, thereby enhancing the monitoring system for corporate credit risk. Furthermore, the HKMA conducted targeted assessments focusing on key credit risk management monitoring measures, such as the approval criteria and risk management for large corporate loans, loan classification and provisioning systems, credit risk governance frameworks, risk management of loans to property developers, as well as mortgage loans and insurance policy-backed loans.

src_raw: 住宅物業價格在2018年7月到達歷史高位，但在下半年出現緩和跡象。金管局自2009年10月以來推出的8輪逆周期宏觀審慎監管措施，已增強香港銀行體系應對本港樓市可能逆轉的抵禦能力。新造住宅按揭貸款的平均按揭成數由2009年9月金管局推出首輪逆周期措施前的64%，降至2018年12月的46%。平均供款與入息比率亦由2010年8月首度推出有關比率上限時的41%，降至2018年12月的34%（圖1）。
mt_raw: Residential property prices reached a historical high in July 2018 but showed signs of easing in the second half of the year. The Hong Kong Monetary Authority's (HKMA) eight rounds of countercyclical macroprudential measures, introduced since October 2009, have strengthened the resilience of Hong Kong's banking system against potential reversals in the local property market. The average loan-to-value ratio for new residential mortgages fell from 64% in September 2009, before the HKMA introduced its first round of countercyclical measures, to 46% in December 2018. The average debt service-to-income ratio also decreased from 41% in August 2010, when the HKMA first introduced a cap on this ratio, to 34% in December 2018 (Figure 1).

src_raw: 銀行業面對的科技風險仍然偏高。金管局於2016年推出「網絡防衛評估框架」。第一期實施安排涵蓋包括所有大型銀行在內的30間認可機構，該等認可機構已完成3個階段的評估，即自身風險程度評估、成熟程度評估及（如適用）風險資訊主導網絡攻防模擬測試。有關評估有助認可機構查找需要改進的運作範疇及採取補救措施，加強網絡防衛。與此同時，金管局已制定第二及第三期實施安排的時間表，這兩期實施安排將涵蓋其餘認可機構。年內金管局進行現場審查，集中檢視認可機構的網絡保安管控措施、外判安排及資訊科技管治。
mt_raw: The technology risks facing the banking sector remain relatively high. In 2016, the Financial Supervisory Commission launched the "Cyber Defense Assessment Framework." The first phase of implementation covered 30 licensed institutions, including all large banks, which have completed three stages of assessment: self-assessment of risk levels, assessment of maturity, and (where applicable) risk-informed cyber defense simulation exercises. These assessments help licensed institutions identify areas for improvement and take remedial actions to strengthen their cyber defenses. Concurrently, the Financial Supervisory Commission has established timelines for the second and third phases of implementation, which will cover the remaining licensed institutions. Within the year, the Commission will conduct on-site inspections, focusing on licensed institutions' cybersecurity controls, outsourcing arrangements, and IT governance.

src_raw: 金管局繼續就2017年9月公布的7項推動智慧銀行的措施與銀行業合作，以促進金融科技在香港的發展。在監管層面，金管局於5月發出《虛擬銀行的認可》指引修訂本。此外，金管局在「銀行易」措施下，已經精簡有關遙距開戶、網上貸款及網上財富管理的監管要求。這些優化的監管要求有助銀行提供更佳的網上銀行用戶體驗。「銀行易」措施的工作範疇在9月擴大至促進銀行採用金融合規科技(Regtech)，而當中3個新的工作重點包括打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集的監察科技、用於審慎風險管理和合規的金融合規科技，以及「機器可讀」的監管要求。
mt_raw: The HKMA continues to collaborate with the banking industry on the seven measures introduced in September 2017 to promote smart banking, aiming to foster the development of fintech in Hong Kong. On the regulatory front, the HKMA issued revised guidelines on the recognition of virtual banks in May. Additionally, under the "Banking Easy" initiative, the HKMA has simplified regulatory requirements related to remote account opening, online loans, and online wealth management. These optimized regulatory requirements help banks provide better online banking user experiences. In September, the scope of the "Banking Easy" initiative was expanded to promote the adoption of financial compliance technology (Regtech) by banks. The three new focuses include monitoring technology for combating money laundering and terrorist financing, Regtech for prudential risk management and compliance, and machine-readable regulatory requirements.

mt_raw: As the United States monetary policy continues to normalize, the Financial Supervisory Commission has strengthened the regulation of liquidity risk to ensure that supervised entities prudently and effectively manage their liquidity risks. src_raw: 政府於4月發表的《香港洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集風險評估報告》指出，香港銀行體系面對高洗錢威脅，這與其他國際金融中心一樣，亦反映金融服務日趨全球化及複雜。香港面對的洗錢威脅除源自本地犯罪活動外，在更大程度上也來自境外活動。該等境外活動包括來自境外貪污活動的非法得益、跨國犯罪集團的詐騙活動、逃稅及基於香港作為支付及貿易樞紐的地位而引致與制裁相關的風險。在金管局協助下，政府制定打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集政策聲明，列載對該等威脅的回應，目標是在提高打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集制度的應對能力的同時，又能吸引及便利正當企業。
mt_raw: The Risk Assessment Report on Money Laundering and Terrorist Financing in Hong Kong, published in April, points out that Hong Kong's banking system faces high money laundering threats, similar to other international financial centers, reflecting the increasing globalization and complexity of financial services. The money laundering threats facing Hong Kong not only originate from local criminal activities but, to a greater extent, from overseas activities. These overseas activities include illegal proceeds from corruption abroad, fraudulent activities by transnational criminal organizations, tax evasion, and risks related to sanctions due to Hong Kong's status as a payment and trade hub. With the assistance of the Hong Kong Monetary Authority, the government has formulated a Policy Statement on Combating Money Laundering and Terrorist Financing, which outlines responses to these threats. The objective is to enhance the capacity to combat money laundering and terrorist financing while also attracting and facilitating legitimate businesses.

src_raw: 《2018年打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集（金融機構）（修訂）條例》於3月1日生效，引入的修訂包括在核實客戶身分方面賦予靈活性，以配合認可機構利用科技方便客戶開戶的發展。新法例亦擴大適用範圍，規定律師、會計師、地產代理及信託或公司服務提供者須負上打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集的責任，從而全面強化打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集制度。該等修訂連同《公司條例》為提高企業實益擁有權透明度而作出的修訂，有助認可機構執行打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集方面的工作。
mt_raw: The Anti-Money Laundering and Counter-Terrorist Financing (Financial Institutions) (Amendment) Ordinance 2018 came into effect on March 1, introducing amendments that provide flexibility in verifying customer identities to accommodate the development of technology-enabled customer onboarding by authorized institutions. The new legislation also broadens the scope of application, requiring lawyers, accountants, real estate agents, and trust or company service providers to take responsibility for combating money laundering and terrorist financing, thereby comprehensively strengthening the anti-money laundering and counter-terrorist financing regime. These amendments, together with the amendments to the Companies Ordinance aimed at enhancing transparency of beneficial ownership of companies, will assist authorized institutions in carrying out their work against money laundering and terrorist financing.

src_raw: 隨着中國內地與香港資本市場的互聯互通計劃優化措施的落實，香港作為進入中國內地主要門戶的獨特地位進一步加強。「債券通」全面實施即時貨銀兩訖(DvP)結算模式及國務院宣布境外投資者投資中國境內債券市場的稅務寛免安排，進一步提升計劃的效率及吸引力。金管局亦與內地當局緊密合作，探討及實施多項金融配套措施，便利在粵港澳大灣區（大灣區）生活、工作及營商的個人和企業。香港離岸人民幣業務繼續蓬勃發展，人民幣存款資金池全年上升6%至6,577億元人民幣；人民幣即時支付結算(RTGS)系統平均每日交易額達到10,101億元人民幣的高水平。
mt_raw: With the implementation of optimized measures under the China Mainland-Hong Kong capital market connectivity program, Hong Kong's unique position as the main gateway to the China Mainland has been further strengthened. The full implementation of the real-time gross settlement (DvP) model under the "Bond Connect" initiative, along with the State Council's announcement of tax exemption arrangements for overseas investors in the China's domestic bond market, has further enhanced the efficiency and appeal of the program. The Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) has also closely cooperated with mainland authorities to explore and implement various financial support measures, facilitating individuals and businesses living, working, and operating in the Guangdong-Hong Kong-Macao Greater Bay Area (GBA). Hong Kong's offshore RMB business continues to thrive, with the annual RMB deposit pool increasing by 6% to RMB 657.7 billion. The average daily transaction value of the RMB real-time gross settlement (RTGS) system reached a high level of RMB 10,101 billion.

src_raw: 金管局積極開拓進一步提升香港金融平台競爭力的新機會。為促進香港債券市場的發展，金管局落實《財政預算案》所提出的「債券資助先導計劃」，為首次在香港發行債券的機構提供資助，並與政府緊密合作修訂法例，擴大「合資格債務票據計劃」下可獲稅務豁免的債券投資收入範圍。金管局亦加強市場推廣活動，向海外及內地持份者宣傳香港的優勢，包括舉辦多項大型及專題外展活動推廣香港為綠色金融、基建融資及企業財資中心樞紐。
mt_raw: The Hong Kong Monetary Authority is actively exploring new opportunities to further enhance the competitiveness of Hong Kong’s financial platform. To promote the development of Hong Kong’s bond market, the HKMA has implemented the “Bond Grant Pilot Scheme” proposed in the Budget, providing subsidies to institutions issuing bonds in Hong Kong for the first time. It is also working closely with the government to amend legislation and expand the scope of tax-exempt bond investment income under the “Qualified Debt Securities Scheme.” The HKMA has also intensified its market promotion activities, promoting Hong Kong’s advantages to overseas and mainland stakeholders, including hosting numerous large-scale and thematic outreach events to promote Hong Kong as a hub for green finance, infrastructure financing, and corporate finance.

src_raw: 香港金融基建的安全及有效運作，為香港作為國際金融中心的地位奠定穩固基礎。處理銀行同業交易的4個RTGS系統、債務工具中央結算系統（CMU系統）及香港交易資料儲存庫（香港儲存庫）在2018年達到100%的系統可供使用率，高於99.95%的目標水平。透過於內地兩個中央證券託管機構的帳戶，CMU系統繼續協助結算「債券通」北向通交易，以及替相關CMU系統成員持有內地債務證券。
mt_raw: The safe and effective operation of Hong Kong’s financial infrastructure lays a solid foundation for its status as an international financial center. The four Real-Time Gross Settlement (RTGS) systems handling interbank transactions, the Central Money Markets Unit (CMU) system, and the Hong Kong Securities Clearing and Settlement System (Hong Kong Securities Depository) all achieved 100% system availability in 2018, exceeding the target level of 99.95%. Through accounts maintained with two central securities depositories on the Mainland, the CMU system continues to facilitate the settlement of northbound trading under the Bond Connect scheme, as well as holding Mainland debt securities on behalf of relevant CMU system members.

src_raw: 為促進零售支付業的整體安全及效率，金管局於8月根據《支付系統及儲值支付工具條例》（《支付條例》）指定多兩個零售支付系統，使其運作受到金管局監察。迄今受金管局監察的指定零售支付系統增至6個。金管局亦對16個儲值支付工具持牌人進行監管。有關持牌人積極推出新產品及服務，致力為客戶提供更多選擇及更佳的用戶體驗。與此同時，電子支票與電子帳單及繳費服務涵蓋範圍，進一步擴展至包括香港與整個廣東省的跨境支付交易。
mt_raw: To enhance the overall security and efficiency of the retail payment industry, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) designated two additional retail payment systems in August under the Payment Systems and Stored Value Facilities Ordinance (Payment Ordinance), bringing the number of designated retail payment systems under HKMA supervision to six. The HKMA also regulates 16 licensed stored value facility operators, who are actively introducing new products and services to provide customers with more choices and a better user experience. Meanwhile, the coverage of electronic cheques and electronic bill and payment services has further expanded to include cross-border payment transactions between Hong Kong and the entire province of Guangdong.

mt_raw: The Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) announced seven measures to promote smart banking in September 2017, aiming to help the banking industry elevate to a higher level and seize the vast opportunities brought by the convergence of banking and technology. During the year, the HKMA made good progress in implementing these measures and advancing the transformation of Hong Kong's financial ecosystem.

mt_raw: The Hong Kong Monetary Authority launched the Hong Kong Retail Payment Shared QR Code Standard and its associated mobile application, "HKQR," in the same month. This globally pioneering mobile application integrates multiple QR codes into a single, unified QR code, facilitating merchants—particularly small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs)—to accept payment solutions from different payment service providers using a single QR code, eliminating the need to display multiple QR codes to customers.

src_raw: 開放API是指透過向第三方服務供應商開放銀行的相關數據，更好更方便地融合銀行與其他行業的服務。用家單用一個系統就能在安全環境下享受綜合服務。為促進銀行界研發及提供開放API，金管局於7月發布開放API框架。該框架採用風險為本原則，並分4個階段落實各項開放API功能。截至2019年1月底，20間銀行已開放第一階段約500個開放API接口，涵蓋逾1,000項產品及服務的資料。
mt_raw: Open APIs enable banks to share their data with third-party service providers, fostering seamless integration of banking services with other industries. This allows users to access a comprehensive range of services through a single, secure system. To encourage the development and adoption of Open APIs within the banking sector, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) launched the Open API Framework in July. The framework employs a risk-based approach and is being implemented in four phases. As of January 31, 2019, 20 banks had opened approximately 500 API interfaces in the first phase, providing data access to over 1,000 products and services.

src_raw: 建基於金管局主導的貿易融資概念驗證成果由香港多間銀行組成的聯盟於10月啟動以分布式分類帳技術(DLT)為基礎的貿易融資平台「貿易聯動」。該平台旨在透過數碼化貿易文件及自動化貿易融資流程，減低失誤及詐騙風險。截至2018年底，已有12間銀行加入成為該聯盟成員。「貿易聯動」與歐洲貿易融資平台「we.trade」於10月簽署《諒解備忘錄》，進行對接雙方平台的概念驗證。金管局亦同步探討「貿易聯動」與其他地區對接的機會，包括與新加坡金融管理局合作推出「全球貿易連接網絡」。
mt_raw: TradeLink, a trade finance platform built on distributed ledger technology (DLT), was launched in October by a consortium of Hong Kong banks, following a proof of concept led by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA). The platform aims to reduce errors and fraud risks by digitizing trade documents and automating trade finance processes. As of the end of 2018, 12 banks had joined the consortium. In October, TradeLink signed a Memorandum of Understanding with the European trade finance platform we.trade to conduct a pilot program for connecting the two platforms. The HKMA is also exploring opportunities to connect TradeLink with other regions, including collaborating with the Monetary Authority of Singapore to launch the Global Trade Connectivity Network.

src_raw: 2018年對投資者而言是困難的一年，投資環境備受多項風險因素困擾，包括美國利率持續正常化引發金融狀況收緊、主要經濟體之間的貿易摩擦升級，以及全球多處民粹主義抬頭及地緣政治風險加劇。環球股市普遍向下，美國國庫券收益率亦隨着美國聯邦儲備局4次加息而上升。在美息趨升下，美元轉強。部分新興市場面對國內嚴峻的政治及經濟壓力，其貨幣顯著下挫。儘管投資環境充滿挑戰，外匯基金在2018年仍錄得109億港元投資收入。
mt_raw: 2018 was a challenging year for investors, with the investment environment beset by numerous risk factors, including the continued normalization of US interest rates leading to tighter financial conditions, escalating trade tensions between major economies, and the rise of populism and increased geopolitical risks in various parts of the world. Global stock markets generally declined, and US Treasury yields also rose as the US Federal Reserve raised interest rates four times. Amid rising US interest rates, the US dollar strengthened. Some emerging markets faced severe domestic political and economic pressures, causing their currencies to depreciate significantly. Despite the challenging investment environment, the foreign exchange fund still recorded investment income of HKD 10.9 billion in 2018.

mt_raw: According to the Exchange Fund Ordinance, the primary objective of the Exchange Fund is to influence the exchange rate of the Hong Kong dollar, directly or indirectly. src_raw: 為能更妥善管理風險及提高中長期回報，金管局以審慎及循序漸進方式將外匯基金的部分資產分散投資至較多元化的資產類別，包括新興巿場及內地債券與股票、私募股權（包括基建）及房地產。新興巿場及內地債券與股票由投資組合持有，私募股權及房地產投資則由長期增長組合持有。長期增長組合的市值上限為外匯基金累計盈餘的三分之一及未來基金與外匯基金附屬公司存款中與長期增長組合掛鈎部分的總和。
mt_raw: To better manage risks and enhance long-term returns, the Monetary Authority has prudently and incrementally diversified a portion of the Exchange Fund’s assets into a wider range of asset classes, including emerging market and mainland China bonds and equities, private equity (including infrastructure), and real estate. Emerging market and mainland China bonds and equities are held through investment portfolios, while private equity and real estate investments are held through a long-term growth portfolio. The market capitalization limit of the long-term growth portfolio is one-third of the Exchange Fund’s accumulated surpluses and the sum of future fund and Exchange Fund affiliated company deposits linked to the long-term growth portfolio.

terms: {'外匯基金': 'Exchange Fund', '循跡誤差': 'tracking error', '戰略性偏離': 'tactical deviations', '戰略性資產配置': 'tactical asset allocation', '投資基準': 'investment benchmark', '投資程序': 'investment process', '投資組合經理': 'portfolio managers', '策略性資產配置': 'strategic asset allocation', '金管局': 'HKMA'}
src_raw: 外匯基金的投資程序分別以策略性資產配置及戰略性資產配置作基礎。策略性資產配置，即投資基準反映的配置情況，顯示外匯基金為達到投資目標而可作出的長線資產配置。外匯基金以策略性配置作為指引，對資產進行戰略性配置，以爭取超越基準的回報。因此，實際配置往往會與基準配置（亦即策略性配置）有所偏離，而實際與基準配置之間的差距稱為「戰略性偏離」。財政司司長經諮詢外匯基金諮詢委員會後制定投資基準及循跡誤差限額，金管局獲授權決定戰略性資產配置及定出戰略性偏離的容許範圍。投資組合經理可在戰略性偏離的容許範圍內選持倉盤，從短期市場變化中獲利。
mt_raw: The Exchange Fund’s investment process is based on both strategic asset allocation and tactical asset allocation. Strategic asset allocation, which reflects the allocation indicated by the benchmark, shows the long-term asset allocation the Exchange Fund can make to achieve its investment objectives. Guided by the strategic allocation, the Exchange Fund tactically allocates assets to seek returns exceeding the benchmark. Consequently, the actual allocation often deviates from the benchmark allocation (i.e., the strategic allocation), and the difference between the actual and benchmark allocations is termed “tactical deviation.” The Financial Secretary, after consulting the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee, establishes the investment benchmark and tracking error limits, and the Monetary Authority is authorized to decide on the tactical asset allocation and set the permissible range for tactical deviation. Portfolio managers can hold positions within the permissible range of tactical deviation to profit from short-term market movements.

src_raw: 金管局於8月成立外匯基金投資辦公室，專責投資及相關風險管理職能。該辦公室職員負責直接管理外匯基金約72%的投資，包括整個支持組合及部分投資組合。該部分的投資組合投資於環球定息市場，並透過衍生工具執行外匯基金的宏觀風險管理策略。
mt_raw: The Financial Supervisory Commission established a Foreign Exchange Fund Investment Office in August, dedicated to investment and related risk management functions. The office’s staff are responsible for directly managing approximately 72% of the foreign exchange fund’s investments, including the entire supporting portfolio and a portion of the investment portfolio. This portion of the investment portfolio invests in global fixed income markets and executes the foreign exchange fund’s macroeconomic risk management strategies through derivative instruments.

src_raw: 投資環境越趨複雜，突顯風險管理的重要。金管局為內部及外聘投資經理所管理的投資組合均訂立嚴格管控措施及投資指引，並密切監察對指引及法規的遵守情況。金管局已加強風險評估，以配合外匯基金越趨多元化的投資；另採用風險管控工具來評估在正常及極度不利市況下的市場風險。金管局亦進行詳細的投資表現因素分析，以識別促成不同表現的成因，藉此評估如何充分利用內部及外聘投資經理的投資管理技術。
mt_raw: As the investment environment becomes increasingly complex, the importance of risk management is highlighted. The Hong Kong Monetary Authority has established strict control measures and investment guidelines for both internal and externally hired investment managers, and closely monitors compliance with these guidelines and regulations. The Authority has also strengthened risk assessment to align with the growing diversification of the Foreign Exchange Fund's investments; it also employs risk control tools to evaluate market risks under normal and extremely adverse market conditions. Additionally, the Authority conducts detailed analysis of investment performance factors to identify the causes behind different performance outcomes, thereby assessing how to fully leverage the investment management expertise of both internal and external investment managers.

src_raw: 金管局支持負責任投資。例如，金管局已採納證券及期貨事務監察委員會公布的《負責任的擁有權原則》。該套原則旨在協助投資者釐定如何以最佳方法履行其於香港上市公司投資的擁有權責任。就外匯基金的管理而言，金管局已就環境、社會及管治因素制定內部指引，適用於外聘基金經理的甄選、委任及監察程序。獲委任負責主動式管理香港股票組合的外聘基金經理，須在管理有關投資時遵守《負責任的擁有權原則》。整體而言，金管局已將環境、社會及管治因素納入投資及相關監察活動的內部程序。金管局會密切注視環境、社會及管治因素的相關標準的發展，並評估如何能夠將這些標準進一步融入投資程序。此外，為促進負責任投資的國際合作，金管局已成為非牟利組織FCLTGlobal的成員，該組織旨在推動長遠目標為本的業務及投資決定。
mt_raw: The Hong Kong Monetary Authority supports responsible investment. For example, the HKMA has adopted the Principles of Responsible Ownership published by the Securities and Futures Commission. These principles aim to help investors determine the best way to fulfill their ownership responsibilities in Hong Kong-listed companies. Regarding the management of the Exchange Fund, the HKMA has established internal guidelines on environmental, social and governance (ESG) factors, applicable to the selection, appointment and monitoring of external fund managers. External fund managers appointed to actively manage the Hong Kong equity portfolio are required to comply with the Principles of Responsible Ownership when managing these investments. Overall, the HKMA has integrated ESG factors into its internal procedures for investment and related monitoring activities. The HKMA will closely monitor the development of relevant ESG standards and assess how these standards can be further incorporated into its investment processes. Furthermore, to promote international cooperation in responsible investment, the HKMA has become a member of the non-profit organization FCLTGlobal, which aims to promote business and investment decisions with a long-term orientation.

src_raw: 在2018年，原先被市場低估的多項風險因素一一浮現，包括美國利率正常化的步伐、美國政府外貿政策和保護主義對全球貿易的衝擊，以及地緣政治的風險，環球金融市場因而出現大幅波動及調整。
mt_raw: In 2018, several risk factors previously underestimated by the market began to materialize, including the pace of U.S. interest rate normalization, the impact of U.S. trade policy – including protectionist measures – on global trade, and geopolitical risks. These developments triggered significant volatility in international financial markets.

src_raw: 中美貿易爭議升級，令投資者非常憂慮，新興市場及香港股市自1月底開始反覆下跌，恒生指數自該月份的高位最多下跌27%。自第4季起，主要歐美股市亦大幅下滑，錄得雙位數字跌幅。就2018年整體而言，全球股市普遍下跌，涵蓋已發展國家股市的MSCI全球指數下跌10.4%，MSCI新興市場指數亦下跌16.6%。
mt_raw: The escalation of the US-China trade dispute has caused investors great concern, with emerging markets and Hong Kong stocks experiencing repeated declines since the end of January, and the Hang Seng Index falling as much as 27% from its peak in that month. Starting from the fourth quarter, major European and American stock markets also declined significantly, recording two-digit percentage drops. Overall for 2018, global stock markets generally declined, with the MSCI Global Index, which covers developed market stocks, falling by 10.4%, and the MSCI Emerging Markets Index also falling by 16.6%.

src_raw: 債市方面，由於美國貨幣政策正常化，美國國庫券收益率於2018年大致向上。然而，年內債市仍有波動。例如10年期美國國庫券收益率由年初約2.5%上升至11月3.2%的7年新高，但至年底時受投資者憂慮中美貿易爭議及趨向避險投資所影響而回軟至2.7%。
mt_raw: In the bond market, due to the normalization of US monetary policy, US Treasury yields generally rose throughout 2018. However, the bond market still experienced fluctuations during the year. For example, the yield on 10-year US Treasury notes rose from approximately 2.5% at the beginning of the year to a seven-year high of 3.2% in November, but softened to 2.7% by year-end as investors grew concerned about the US-China trade dispute and shifted towards risk-averse investments.

src_raw: 貨幣市場方面，年內美元跟隨美國加息轉強。美匯指數上升4.4%，歐元及人民幣等主要貨幣兌美元下跌約5%。此外，部分新興市場受到國內政局及經濟不穩影響，其貨幣進一步受挫。例如，阿根廷披索及土耳其里拉兌美元分別下跌約五成及三成。相比之下，避險投資需求帶動日圓兌美元上升2.7%。
mt_raw: In the currency market, the US dollar strengthened this year following interest rate hikes in the United States. The US Dollar Index rose 4.4%, while major currencies such as the Euro and the Renminbi depreciated approximately 5% against the dollar. Furthermore, the currencies of some emerging markets suffered further setbacks due to domestic political and economic instability. For example, the Argentine Peso and the Turkish Lira fell by approximately 50% and 30% against the dollar, respectively. In contrast, demand for safe-haven investments drove the Japanese Yen up 2.7% against the dollar.

mt_raw: The Hong Kong Monetary Authority’s (HKMA) official website (www.hkma.gov.hk) provides over 60,000 pages of information in English, traditional Chinese, and simplified Chinese, enabling the public to access the latest updates from the HKMA. The website also hosts the "Register of Recognized Institutions and Local Representative Offices" and the "Register of Securities Business Employees of Recognized Institutions," maintained under Section 20 of the Banking Ordinance, as well as the "Register of Licensed Operators of Stored Value Facilities" under the Payment Systems and Stored Value Facilities Ordinance. The website features dedicated topic pages and prominent quick links to alert the public about new HKMA initiatives, such as "Faster Payments," and important timely information, such as precautions against phone scams and the parking locations of cash collection vehicles under the coin collection program.
